---
title: "td5"
format: html
editor: visual
---
```{r}
df_velo <- readr::read_delim("244400404_comptages-velo-nantes-metropole (1).csv", delim = ";")
```

```{r}
usethis::use_data(df_velo, overwrite = TRUE)
```
```{r}
devtools::load_all()
```
```{r}
df_velo
```
```{r}
devtools::document()
devtools::load_all()
?df_velo
```
```{r}
devtools::document()
```
```{r}
devtools::load_all()
filtrer_trajet(df_velo, c("880", "881"))
```
